channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Hailey Bieber Shares Family Moments From Justin Bieber’s Coachella Headlining Debut
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to this week's entertainment update. We're talking music festivals and celebrity families. Justin Bieber made his Coachella headline debut, and it was a family affair. His wife Hailey took to Instagram to share some behind-the-scenes moments from their weekend at the festival."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Hailey posted a carousel of photos and videos, including a cute shot of their 19-month-old son Jack Blues Bieber sporting a 'Bieberchella' temporary tattoo on his forearm. The post also showed Hailey dancing during soundcheck and the family enjoying quality time together."
[Short music transition]
Host: "During Justin's headlining set, Hailey was in the crowd, and the Coachella livestream camera caught her blowing him a kiss as he sang a romantic lyric. Their son Jack even got a shoutout during the performance. The weekend was a full family affair, with Justin's SKYLRK brand and Hailey's Rhode making appearances at the festival."
[Short music transition]
Host: "This isn't the first time we've seen glimpses of Jack, although his parents have never shown his face publicly. He's appeared in promotional images for Justin's album SWAG and in photos with his parents on social media."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "Justin returns to the Coachella Main Stage to headline weekend two on April 18. That's all for this week. Thanks for tuning in."
